name: ai-driven-development
description: An umbrella collection of 20 skills + 1 hook for AI-driven development: agent self-configuration (MCP / hooks / settings / subagents / skills / plugins / Claude Code optimisation), engineering practices (prompt engineering, FPF problem solving, bug-fix protocol, repository-history investigation, C# refactoring), research & docs (Semantic Scholar deep research, URL-to-Markdown, ubiquitous-language thesaurus), multi-agent orchestration (consilium), macOS health & cleanup, and niche utilities (clipboard, repo-explorer, Windows QA). Plus a Claude Code Bash safety hook.
